summary: Comprehensive testing of OpportuneAI internship hunter platform completed. Backend APIs (15/15) and frontend UI flows working correctly. Real Arbeitnow API integration functional with 100+ internships loaded.

ui_bugs.issue: Status select dropdown not clickable in desktop table view
ui_bugs.details: Element exists but appears hidden/not visible in desktop table. Mobile view may work fine.

passed_tests: Auth: Signup with name, email, password - returns token and user
Auth: Login with email, password - returns token
Auth: /api/auth/me with valid token - returns user info
Profile: GET /api/profile - returns user profile
Profile: PUT /api/profile/update - updates skills, education successfully
Internships: GET /api/internships - returns 100 real internships from Arbeitnow API
Internships: Search and filter functionality working
Bookmarks: POST /api/bookmarks - creates bookmark successfully
Bookmarks: GET /api/bookmarks - lists bookmarks
Bookmarks: DELETE /api/bookmarks/{id} - removes bookmark
Applications: POST /api/applications - tracks application
Applications: GET /api/applications - lists applications
Dashboard: GET /api/dashboard/stats - returns correct stats
Recommendations: POST /api/recommendations/analyze - skill gap analysis working
Frontend: Auth page loads with login/signup tabs
Frontend: Signup flow redirects to dashboard successfully
Frontend: Dashboard shows stat cards (6 cards loaded)
Frontend: Internship listings page loads with real data (100 cards)
Frontend: Profile page loads with editable fields (4 sections)
Frontend: Sidebar navigation works between all pages
Frontend: Bookmark functionality working with success toast
Frontend: Track application functionality working with success toast
Frontend: Skill gap analysis dialog opens and displays results
action_item_for_main_agent: Minor UI fix needed: Status dropdown in Applications page desktop table view is not clickable. Element exists but visibility issue prevents interaction.
